case_title: ANDREA V. CORIA VS. AMORY DONAHUE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORIA, ANDREA V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DONAHUE, AMORY DBA LANGUAGE IN ACTION, LLC DEFENDANT AMORY DONAHUE, AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DONAHUE, AMORY DBA LANGUAGE IN ACTION, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. MONICA BARBA INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DONAHUE, AMORY DBA LANGUAGE IN ACTION, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CORIA, ANDREA V. AS TO DEFENDANT DONAHUE, AMORY DBA LANGUAGE IN ACTION, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
